subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 640303939/210416925 is not a GRB
body:
O.J.Roberts (USRA/NASA MSFC) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

���The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 640303939/210416925 at 22:12:14.87  UT
on 16 April 2021, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. 
This trigger is likely due to local particles at SAA entry.
